cards.back: A type of data warehouse architecture that uses a central dimension table and fact tables that are related to the dimension tables
A table in an ETL process that stores the data and is used to retrieve data for analysis
A software tool that extracts, transforms, and loads data into a data warehouse
A framework used to measure the effectiveness and efficiency of a data warehouse in supporting business decision-making
A data structure that stores data in a hierarchical format and supports online analytical processing
